expertAssessments.rationale: The targeted AI stream contract was validated through both Cloud Run direct and Vercel BFF paths.
The GitLab release pipeline deployed frontend and AI Engine successfully and production version metadata matches the release commit.
The modified metadata contract can be tested without browser automation by asserting data-done/done stream metadata over HTTP.
The monitoring.metric_peak semantic frame selected monitoring-peak-metric evidence and preserved semanticQueryTrace in the emitted metadata.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed after v8.11.135 production QA; effective usage 7.3966 USD, billed usage 0.0000 USD, charge count 6699.

completedImprovements.title: Multi-agent supervisor stream preserves semanticQueryTrace for monitoring metric_peak evidence
completedImprovements.evidence: Vercel guest-auth stream and Cloud Run direct stream both returned resolvedMode=multi with semanticQueryTrace present, selectedCapability=monitoring.metric_peak, selectedEvidenceProvider=monitoring-peak-metric.

notes: No Playwright MCP was used for this targeted retest.
This run validates the backend/BFF stream metadata required for the UI evidence label, but does not visually confirm the rendered Korean label text.
mode audit: semantic monitoring.metric_peak frame forced auto-resolved-multi in both direct Cloud Run and Vercel guest-auth API paths; execution mode matched expected multi-agent.
